range_hints.T: Valor tГӯpico entre 0 y 500. Valor por defecto: 300 K.
range_hints.area: Valor tГӯpico entre 0 y 500. Valor por defecto: 1 mВІ.

result_context: La potencia radiada segГәn la Ley de Stefan-Boltzmann es {power} W.
result_context_en: The radiated power according to the Stefan-Boltzmann Law is {power} W.
result_context_fr: La puissance rayonnГ©e selon la loi de Stefan-Boltzmann est de {power} W.
result_context_pt: A potГӘncia radiada segundo a Lei de Stefan-Boltzmann Г© {power} W.
result_context_de: Die abgestrahlte Leistung nach dem Stefan-Boltzmann-Gesetz betrГӨgt {power} W.
result_context_it: La potenza irradiata secondo la legge di Stefan-Boltzmann ГЁ {power} W.
steps: Introducir los valores de T, area y emissivity
Verificar que las unidades sean correctas y convertir si es necesario (K, В°C, В°F)
Realizar el cГЎlculo para obtener power
El resultado se expresa en W. Verificar que la magnitud es coherente
Documentar el resultado con sus unidades para usarlo en cГЎlculos de ingenierГӯa posteriores

es.name: Ley de Stefan-Boltzmann
es.description: Calcula la potencia radiada por un cuerpo negro.
es.seo_description: Calcula la potencia radiada por un cuerpo negro. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantГЎnea Usado por profesionales y estudiantes en todo el mundo.
es.example_label: Find radiated power from a 2.5 mВІ surface at 500 K with emissivity 0.85.
es.result_context: The radiated power {power} W is emitted according to the Stefan-Boltzmann law.
es.formula_display: P = Пғ Г— Оө Г— A Г— TГўВҒВҙ  where Пғ = 5.670374Г—10ГўВҒВ»ГўВҒВё W/(mВІГўГўвӮ¬В№вҖҰKГўВҒВҙ)
steps: Temperature T = 500 K, area A = 2.5 mВІ, emissivity Оө = 0.85
Calculate TГўВҒВҙ = 500ГўВҒВҙ = 6.25Г—10В№ГўВҒВ°
Multiply: Пғ Г— Оө Г— A Г— TГўВҒВҙ
P = 5.670374Г—10ГўВҒВ»ГўВҒВё Г— 0.85 Г— 2.5 Г— 6.25Г—10В№ГўВҒВ° ГўГўвӮ¬В°ЛҶ 7533.16 W
mistakes: Using Celsius instead of Kelvin (must be absolute temperature)
Forgetting emissivity factor (assumes blackbody)
Wrong power of temperature (must be TвҒҙ)

input_type_review.reason: Correct - temperature with K, В°C, В°F options

en.name: Stefan-Boltzmann Law Calculator
en.description: Calculate radiated power from a black body.
en.seo_description: Stefan-Boltzmann Law Calculator. Temperature, Area, Emissivity вҖ” get Radiated power instantly for your flooring and tiling project. Includes waste factor.
en.example_label: Find radiated power from a 2.5 mВІ surface at 500 K with emissivity 0.85.
en.result_context: The radiated power {power} W is emitted according to the Stefan-Boltzmann law.
en.formula_display: P = ГҸЖ’ Г— ГҺВө Г— A Г— TГғВўГӮВҒГӮВҙ  where ГҸЖ’ = 5.670374Г—10ГғВўГӮВҒГӮВ»ГғВўГӮВҒГӮВё W/(mВІГғВўГўвӮ¬В№вҖҰKГғВўГӮВҒГӮВҙ)
steps: Temperature T = 500 K, area A = 2.5 mВІ, emissivity ГҺВө = 0.85
Calculate TГғВўГӮВҒГӮВҙ = 500ГғВўГӮВҒГӮВҙ = 6.25Г—10ГӮВ№ГғВўГӮВҒВ°
Multiply: ГҸЖ’ Г— ГҺВө Г— A Г— TГғВўГӮВҒГӮВҙ
P = 5.670374Г—10ГғВўГӮВҒГӮВ»ГғВўГӮВҒГӮВё Г— 0.85 Г— 2.5 Г— 6.25Г—10ГӮВ№ГғВўГӮВҒВ° ГғВўГўвӮ¬В°ГӢвҖ  7533.16 W
mistakes: Using Celsius instead of Kelvin (must be absolute temperature)
Forgetting emissivity factor (assumes blackbody)
Wrong power of temperature (must be TГўВҒВҙ)

input_type_review.reason: Correct - temperature with K, В°C, В°F options
